The land which has the c<Jlour of the Sun, fire, ashes, camel
or donkey, is said to be waterless. If the Karira exudes milk and has
red sprouts, and the earth red, there will be water underneath
stones.

A rock that resembles beryl, green gram, cloud, dark gem,
ripe fig, bee or collyrium, or is brown, should be understood as
having abundant water nearby.
